zh.lifeSummary: 當William de la Plaunche於1310年出生在英國巴金哈姆爾哈維沙安時，他的父親James de la Plaunche45歲，母親Lady Maud de Haversham37歲。他於1342年與Elizabeth Hillary在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾貝斯可特結婚。他們至少是3個女兒的父母。他去世於1347年9月5日在英國英格蘭巴金哈姆爾哈維沙安享年37歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William de la Plaunche于1310年出生在英国巴金哈姆爾哈維沙安时，他的父亲James de la Plaunche45岁，母亲Lady Maud de Haversham37岁。他于1342年与Elizabeth Hillary在英国英格兰斯塔福爾貝斯可特结婚。他们至少是3个女儿的父母。他去世于1347年9月5日在英国英格兰巴金哈姆爾哈維沙安享年37岁。

nameMeanings.name: Plaunche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: French (Plauché): variant of Plauchier, a nickname from Old Occitan plauchier ‘clumsy’.

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

nameMeanings.name: de

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When William de la Plaunche was born in 1310, in Haversham, Buckinghamshire, England, his father, James de la Plaunche, was 45 and his mother, Lady Maud de Haversham, was 37. He married Elizabeth Hillary in 1342, in Bescot, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 daughters. He died on 5 September 1347, in Haversham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William de la Plaunche est né en 1310, à Haversham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, son père, James de la Plaunche, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Lady Maud de Haversham, avait 37 ans. Il a épousé Elizabeth Hillary en 1342, à Bescot, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 filles. Il est décédé le 5 septembre 1347, à Haversham, Buckinghamshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als William de la Plaunche 1310 in Haversham, Buckinghamshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater James de la Plaunche 45 und seine Mutter Lady Maud de Haversham 37. Er hat 1342 in Bescot, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom Elizabeth Hillary geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Töchter. Er starb am 5. September 1347 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Haversham, Buckinghamshire, England, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William de la Plaunche è nato il nel 1310 nel Haversham, Buckinghamshire, England, il suo padre, James de la Plaunche, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Lady Maud de Haversham, aveva 37 anni. Lui sposato Elizabeth Hillary nel 1342, nel Bescot, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figlie. Morì il 5 settembre 1347, nel Haversham, Buckinghamshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: William de la Plauncheが1310年にイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヘイバーシャムで生まれた時，父James de la Plauncheは45歳，母Lady Maud de Havershamは37歳であった。1342年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアベスコトでElizabeth Hillaryと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の娘の親であった。彼は1347年9月5日にイギリスイギリスブクインガムシュアイアヘイバーシャムで37歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: William de la Plaunche(이)가 1310년 영국 벅잉함실르 하버샤에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 James de la Plaunche(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Lady Maud de Haversham(은)는 37세였다. 그는 1342년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 베스컷에서 Elizabeth Hillary(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1347년 9월 5일 영국 잉글랜드 벅잉함실르 하버샤에서 37세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William de la Plaunche nasceu em 1310, em Haversham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, James de la Plaunche, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Lady Maud de Haversham, tinha 37 anos. Ele casou-se com Elizabeth Hillary em 1342, em Bescot, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhas. Ele faleceu em 5 de setembro de 1347, em Haversham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William de la Plaunche родился в 1310 г. в местности хавиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, его отцу по имени James de la Plaunche было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Maud de Haversham, 37. Он женился на женщине по имени Elizabeth Hillary в 1342 г. в местности бескот, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 дочери. Он умер 5 сентября 1347 г. в местности хавиршам, буккингхамшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William de la Plaunche nació en 1310, en Haversham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, su papá, James de la Plaunche, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Lady Maud de Haversham, tenía 37 años. Se casó con Elizabeth Hillary en 1342, en Bescot, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijas. Murió el 5 de septiembre de 1347, en Haversham, Buckinghamshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años.
